message:
feat(core): lexical query service with filters, ranking, and snippets (wa-oegrb.4.5)

Implements the query layer over the Tantivy search index for the flight
recorder. Includes SearchQuery builder, 17 filter types, cursor-based
pagination, TF scoring with field boosts, snippet extraction with
configurable highlight markers, and a reference InMemorySearchService.
47 tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
